title: sloanea gymnocarpa
intro: Sloanea gymnocarpa, also known as the hairy-fruited Sloanea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Sloanea gymnocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which can protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and fruits are used to make herbal teas, capsules, or infusions for the treatment of various ailments.
